name: Reilly O'Brien
notes: EMERGENCY for Adelaide. McAndrew has taken R1 ruck spot. O'Brien may return later but $524.2k price is now a TRAP. Do NOT select.

name: Lachlan McAndrew
notes: AFL.com.au confirms No.1 ruck role at Adelaide. 91 SC in preseason. 25yo mature-ager, 96.8 avg in SANFL. REPLACES O'Brien as starting ruck. High ceiling if holds spot.

name: Sam Flanders
notes: St Kilda recruit from Gold Coast. $396.6k mid-pricer, not basement. 95 SC in preseason. Experienced player in new system.

name: Jagga Smith
notes: Named in Carlton Opening Round team. 126 SC in preseason (37 disp, 1 goal). Former top-10 pick with elite disposal. Best rookie in the game.

name: Mattaes Phillipou
notes: 85 SC in preseason. FWD at St Kilda. Year 3 breakout candidate. 168.4k is cheap for his upside.

name: Dyson Sharp
notes: In Essendon predicted 23. MID role at strong club. High ownership (62.5%) reflects consensus on quality. Steady cash generator.

name: Lachy Dovaston
notes: In North predicted 23. 99 SC in preseason, kicked 2 goals. Fwd role at rebuilding club. Good scoring role but job security depends on form.

name: Zeke Uwland
notes: Confirmed for Gold Coast Opening Round. DEF/MID DPP. Half-back/wing role. Academy product with 103 avg in Talent League 2024.

name: Jacob Farrow
notes: In Essendon predicted 23. DEF/MID DPP. Impressive preseason. Playing across half-back.

name: Jai Serong
notes: Named in Sydney Opening Round team. Former Hawk traded to Swans. Playing halfback role. Solid but not spectacular preseason.

name: Todd Marshall
notes: Ross Lyon confirmed he will "definitely play round one". 85 SC in preseason. FWD at Port. $147.9k basement price for an experienced player.

name: Tom Blamires
notes: In North predicted 23. 87 SC in preseason at $99.1k (cheapest possible). MID at rebuild club = opportunity. Excellent value if holds spot.

name: Cooper Duff-Tytler
notes: 84 SC in preseason. RUC/FWD at WCE. Decision between him and Archer Reid for bench spot. Could be excellent if gets ruck role.

name: Deven Robertson
notes: 94 SC in preseason for West Coast. FWD-only but at a rebuilding club. Former Brisbane player, experienced at AFL level (4 prev games).

name: Harry Schoenberg
notes: SUSPENDED Round 1, available Round 2. MID at West Coast. Has AFL experience (1 game). Wait for R2.

name: Josh Lindsay
notes: In West Coast predicted 23 at DEF. Rebuilding club = opportunity. DEF-only limits ceiling slightly.

name: Liam Reidy
notes: Named in Carlton Opening Round team. RUC/FWD DPP is gold. Will play as bench ruck/utility, not main ruck. Score floor ~35, ceiling ~65.

name: Charlie Edwards
notes: In Adelaide predicted 23. DEF/MID DPP. "Impressive summer" per AFL reporters. Could debut R1.

name: Jack Carroll
notes: MID at St Kilda. 3 prev games. Not in predicted best 23 but 23% owned. Could earn spot.

name: Josh Gibcus
notes: Returning from ACL at Richmond. DEF role. 72 SC in preseason. 19.9% ownership. Risk is match fitness/conditioning early.

name: Leonardo Lombard
notes: In Gold Coast predicted 23 as small forward. Fwd-only = lower SC ceiling. Scoring will be volatile.

name: Patrick Retschko
notes: Reports say he has a wing spot at Richmond locked in, but only appeared in 2nd half of preseason game. MID at Richmond.

name: Arthur Jones
notes: MID/FWD at Bulldogs. 4 prev games. Not in predicted best 23.

name: Finlay Macrae
notes: MID/FWD at West Coast. Many young mids competing for spots. High ownership (39.6%) suggests consensus but job security is the risk.

name: Lachie Jaques
notes: ESPN says "leading the way" for Dogs defensive spot. DEF at Western Bulldogs. 24.7% owned.

name: Will Brodie
notes: In Port predicted 23 (Ewan Mackinlay). Wait - Will Brodie is at Port? 39.1% owned. MID but depth piece, scoring ceiling limited by role.

name: Hussien El Achkar
notes: In Essendon predicted 23 as small forward. FWD-only. Low SC ceiling in that role.

name: Talor Byrne
notes: NOT named in Carlton Opening Round team (was emergency). MID/FWD. May come in later.

name: Kalani White
notes: Glandular fever, recovery time TBC. RUC/FWD DPP at Melbourne is great. Wait for fitness update.

name: Lachlan Carmichael
notes: DEF/MID at Bulldogs. Returning from ankle syndesmosis. ESPN says "would have been there with full training block."

name: Matt Whitlock
notes: DEF/FWD at North. 2 prev games. 5.3% owned. Not in predicted best 23.

name: Josaia Delana
notes: In GWS predicted 23 due to injuries. FWD at Giants. May lose spot when others return.

name: Jack Watkins
notes: MID at Port Adelaide. Crowded midfield. Not in predicted best 23.

name: Kye Fincher
notes: DEF/MID at St Kilda. Not in predicted best 23. 3.6% ownership.

name: Leon Kickett
notes: MID/FWD at Fremantle. Not in predicted best 23. 13.9% ownership seems high for his prospects.

name: Oliver Greeves
notes: MID at Hawthorn. Crowded midfield. Not in predicted best 23. 10% ownership is speculative.

name: Wade Derksen
notes: NOT named in Carlton Opening Round team. Was emergency. 25.3% ownership now at risk. Avoid until named.
